creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Dear submitter: 
Pleeeease give us useful information for debugging! 
We need to have 
1) _complete_ panic message 
2) a backtrace 
3) if you're running a modified kernel config (...and I know you do!), we might want to take a look at the config 
4) a dmesg (and not some random lines of it) 
For the backtrace, please take a look the the handbook on how to get one. 
Unfortunately nobody is able to work on this w/o the information requested. 
Thank you for filing this report ;)
